methodsAttempted.notes: Found the official Vicerrectorado de Planificacion, Estudios, Calidad y Acreditacion page describing 2026 generative AI sessions for university teaching and teaching guides.

methodsAttempted.query: site:upv.es inteligencia artificial proteccion de datos UPV generativa
methodsAttempted.notes: Found a UPV-hosted PoliPapers journal AI-use policy with substantive author, review, confidentiality, and ethics rules; other results were articles, blogs, or thesis/repository material.
Verified used sources are on official UPV-controlled domains or subdomains: www.upv.es and polipapers.upv.es.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found guidance/training evidence from a UPV VPEC page and a UPV-hosted PoliPapers journal AI-use policy. No central, binding university-wide AI policy for all UPV students or staff was found in the searched official sources, so claims are scoped to the cited source contexts.

artifacts.claimText: The UPV-hosted PoliPapers journal policy says AI use in evaluation may support verification of texts and data, but full content should not be shared with AI tools, and AI use should respect text confidentiality and personal data principles.

artifacts.title: Universitat Politecnica de Valencia AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: Official-source review for Universitat Politecnica de Valencia found a VPEC teaching/training page on generative AI in university teaching and a UPV-hosted PoliPapers journal AI-use policy. No central binding UPV-wide AI policy for all students, faculty, or staff was found in the searched official sources. Staged claims are therefore scoped to teaching guidance/training and to the specific PoliPapers journal-policy context.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No central binding university-wide AI policy was identified from searched official UPV sources.
PoliPapers evidence is scoped to the cited journal page and should not be generalized to all UPV journals or research activity without additional official sources.
The VPEC evidence is training/guidance context and should not be treated as a mandatory AI policy.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
